judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit all four expectations with solid evidence; they are comparable, with Report 1 marginally more thorough (extra 40%/SMS and production-data caveats).

report_1.evidence: **"Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default."** — False. `clinic-portal/app/security/config.py:3-4` states `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` ... **"Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF."** — Not implemented. ... there is no export/PDF code anywhere in the repo. ... This section must be removed entirely until the feature ships.

report_2.evidence: There is no PDF generation code anywhere in the repo. This is an announced feature that does not exist yet. ... `app/security/config.py` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` ... Before sending: remove or rewrite the PDF export section ... fix or delete the 2FA-default claim

report_1.evidence: `before_scheduling.png` was captured from route `/schedule`, but `after_scheduling.png` was captured from route `/billing/invoices` — the manifest itself documents the mismatch. ... a picture of the billing/invoices screen while claiming it's the redesigned scheduling calendar.

report_2.evidence: Per `captures.json`, `after_scheduling.png` was captured from route `/billing/invoices`, not `/schedule`. ... the "after" image is actually a screenshot of the billing/invoices screen. This must not be sent

report_1.evidence: **`after_export.png` is referenced in the doc (line 26) but does not exist in the repo.** ... There is a 5th file in the image directory, `unused_capture_07.png` (renders "PATIENT LIST"), that exists but is **not referenced anywhere in the document**

report_2.evidence: `after_export.png` does **not exist** in `docs/release/img/` ... The `img/` directory also contains `unused_capture_07.png` ("PATIENT LIST"), which is not referenced by the doc at all

report_1.evidence: **The trailing line "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** is an internal drafting note, not customer-facing copy. ... It should be removed before sending

report_2.evidence: Line 33, **"Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** — this is an internal drafting note about how the document was produced. It doesn't belong in a customer-facing release email and should be stripped before sending
